belier.intro: The sky tonight is dominated by a powerful Full Moon in Capricorn, illuminating the very peak of your chart like a lighthouse. This is a moment of culmination in your career and public life, where your efforts become visible to all. Yet, with the Sun in the tender waters of Cancer, you feel an equal pull toward the quiet sanctuary of your home and inner world.
belier.love: This cosmic opposition stretches between your public duties and your private heart. Be mindful of how your ambitions affect your closest relationships. Mercury's retrograde in your home sector calls for careful, compassionate conversations about what you truly need to feel secure together.
belier.work: A professional chapter reaches its zenith, bringing recognition, responsibility, or the completion of a major project. You are seeing the tangible results of your discipline and hard work. Step into this moment of authority with integrity, knowing that true success is built on a solid foundation.
belier.energy: The intensity of a Full Moon can feel both exhilarating and draining. You might feel pulled in two directions, so conserve your fiery energy rather than burning out.
belier.intuition: Your intuition speaks through the feeling of home within yourself, that unshakeable core of security. Trust the insights that arise when you connect your highest goals to your deepest emotional needs.
belier.mantra: My roots anchor my highest achievements.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The sky opens with a powerful Full Moon in fellow earth sign Capricorn, forming a perfect trine to your very core. This is not a fleeting flash of insight, but a profound and practical revelation, as if a mountain peak has finally cleared of mist. You see the long road you have traveled and the path that lies ahead with grounded clarity.
taureau.love: With Mercury moving backward through your house of communication, words of love can feel like trying to catch water in your hands. Instead, let this Capricorn Moon illuminate your shared values and long-term vision with another. True connection is built on the bedrock of what you both believe in, not just what is said in the moment.
taureau.work: A long-term project or a deeply held professional belief reaches a point of culmination today. This Full Moon shines a light on the structures you have so patiently built, revealing their strength and integrity. It is a moment to honor your perseverance and see how your grandest plans are taking solid, tangible form.
taureau.energy: The earthy lunar energy is profoundly stabilizing, anchoring you even as emotions run high under the full light. Connect with the ground beneath your feet-a walk in a forest or time spent in a garden will replenish you more than any frantic activity.
taureau.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in whispers but in the language of the earth and the body. Pay attention to the solid gut feelings and the practical signs the world presents to you, as old memories surface to offer their wisdom.
taureau.mantra: I build my beliefs on solid ground.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Full Moon in Capricorn illuminates your most intimate commitments and shared resources, creating a powerful tension with the Sun in your house of personal values. This is a moment of culmination, where the balance between what is yours and what you owe comes into focus. With your ruler Mercury retrograde, proceed with care in all financial and emotional negotiations, as clarity comes from review, not from rushing forward.
gemeaux.love: Deep emotional currents surface under this potent lunar light, urging you to look at the foundations of your relationships. A conversation about shared futures or finances may be unavoidable, but it is necessary for growth. Listen carefully to unspoken needs-both yours and theirs-as true intimacy is built on what is felt, not just what is said.
gemeaux.work: This is a day for auditing and analysis, not for new ventures. The Capricorn Full Moon shines a light on joint projects, investments, or debts, revealing their true structural integrity. Re-examine old contracts and revisit past financial agreements, as Mercury retrograde is likely to reveal a crucial detail you missed before.
gemeaux.energy: The emotional weight of this Full Moon may feel grounding, yet also somewhat heavy for your airy nature. You may feel more introverted than usual, pulled inward by a need to process deep feelings. Honor this call for stillness and don't push yourself physically; your vitality is restored through reflection, not action.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition speaks through the quiet language of emotional security and ancestral patterns. A powerful insight may arrive concerning a psychological debt or an entanglement you are ready to release. Trust the feeling that rises from your core-it is a compass pointing you toward genuine self-sufficiency.
gemeaux.mantra: I release what is heavy to reclaim my inner wealth.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The sky opens its great eye tonight with a Full Moon in Capricorn, directly opposite your Sun. This lunar peak illuminates the shoreline where your inner emotional sea meets the solid ground of your responsibilities. With Mercury also moving backward in your own sign, this culmination is a mirror, asking you to review the structures you have built in your life.
cancer.love: This potent lunar light shines on the architecture of your relationships. You may see with sudden clarity the balance-or imbalance-between your needs and the needs of another. Past words may echo in your mind, but seek understanding in quiet reflection rather than a flood of new conversation.
cancer.work: A project may reach its peak, or a professional goal will come into sharp focus under the Capricorn moon's exacting gaze. This is a moment of harvest, not of planting new seeds, especially as communication requires careful revision. Acknowledge your achievements before charting the next course.
cancer.energy: The tide of energy is high and can feel overwhelming, pulling you between the urge to act and the need to retreat. As a child of the Moon, you feel this ebb and flow intimately, so honor your body's need for grounding and rest.
cancer.intuition: Your intuition is a silver thread connecting the conscious and the unconscious worlds today. Insights arrive not through force, but through stillness, like a reflection appearing on the surface of a calm lake. Trust the deep, quiet wisdom that whispers from within.
cancer.mantra: I release what no longer builds my world.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Full Moon in Capricorn casts its bright, clarifying light upon your world of daily routines and duties. While your ruler, the Sun, moves through the quiet waters of your inner realm, this lunar peak asks you to examine the structures that support your life. It is a day of culmination, where the tension between your public responsibilities and your private needs becomes clear.
lion.love: With Pluto retracing its steps in your house of partnerships, relationships are undergoing a deep transformation. This Full Moon may reveal a fundamental truth about the balance of power or effort in a key connection. Be mindful that with Mercury retrograde, words can be misunderstood; seek to understand the heart of the matter, not just the surface.
lion.work: A project may reach a critical turning point, or you will see the undeniable results of your steady, consistent efforts. This is a moment of harvest, showing you precisely what your daily habits have built. Use this clarity to release any routines that drain your creative fire and to honor the discipline that truly serves your ambitions.
lion.energy: The opposition between the Sun and Moon can feel like a pull between two worlds, potentially draining your reserves. Your vitality is not found in grand displays today, but in quiet, structured self-care. Honor the needs of your body as you would a sacred temple.
lion.intuition: Your intuition speaks in dreams and quiet moments of reflection, as the Sun and Mercury wander through your most private sector. Hidden truths surface not with a roar, but a whisper from within. Pay attention to the subtle currents of feeling that guide you from beneath the surface.
lion.mantra: My inner world nourishes my outer duties.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Full Moon rises in Capricorn, a sister earth sign, casting a clarifying light on the architecture of your joy. Like a sculptor seeing the finished form within the stone, you can now perceive the true shape of a creative project or a romantic longing. With your ruler Mercury retracing its steps in the waters of Cancer, this is a moment of heartfelt re-evaluation of where you belong.
vierge.love: In the realm of the heart, today's lunar peak may bring a tender situation to a gentle climax. A quiet truth about a romantic connection is revealed, not with a crash, but with the soft click of a key turning in a lock. Be mindful of words with friends, as old feelings may resurface, asking for clarity, not confusion.
vierge.work: Your diligence finds its reward as projects reach a tangible conclusion under this disciplined moon. Resist the urge to launch a new ship while your ruling planet sails backward; instead, focus on perfecting the vessels already at sea. Review your daily rituals- a small, deliberate change can restructure your entire workflow.
vierge.energy: Your physical energy feels grounded, as if you have planted your feet firmly on solid earth. Channel this into structured movement, but honor the high tide of the Full Moon, which can pull on your reserves and ask for moments of quiet rest.
vierge.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in riddles, but through the clear language of memory and feeling. An old dream or a conversation from the past may hold the key to a present question, so listen closely to your inner archives.
vierge.mantra: I build my life upon what truly nourishes my heart.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: A potent Full Moon in Capricorn illuminates the very foundations of your life, creating a pull between your public ambitions and your private, emotional world. The Sun in Cancer calls you home to your sanctuary, while the Moon demands you look at the structures you have built in your career. This is a day for re-evaluating the architecture of your happiness.
balance.love: Your ruling planet Venus seeks harmony, yet this lunar peak may reveal where balance is lacking in your closest bonds. With Mercury retrograde in a feeling sign, conversations about commitment can feel like walking through fog. Observe what the moonlight reveals about the true needs of your heart before you speak.
balance.work: A spotlight hits your professional life, bringing a project or a long-held ambition to a point of culmination. This is a powerful moment to see your efforts recognized, but it's also a time to release goals that no longer align with your soul's purpose. Success is not a destination, but a state of being in balance.
balance.energy: The tension between the Sun and Moon can feel like being stretched between two worlds, potentially draining your reserves. The earthy Capricorn energy invites you to ground yourself. A simple, mindful walk can anchor your airy nature and steady your spirit.
balance.intuition: As Hermes Trismegistus taught, 'As above, so below.' The external pressures you feel are mirroring an inner dialogue about your true north. This Full Moon offers a moment of piercing clarity- listen to the quiet wisdom that emerges when you allow yourself to be still.
balance.mantra: I find my center in the stillness between worlds.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Capricorn Full Moon illuminates the architecture of your mind, casting a bright light on your thoughts and words. Opposite a Cancer Sun, this is not a cold, logical process, but an emotional excavation of what you truly mean to say. With your ruler Pluto retrograde, you are called to dismantle old mental structures that no longer support your innermost sense of security.
scorpion.love: Communication may feel like navigating a hall of mirrors, as Mercury retrograde rewrites your philosophies on connection. Instead of seeking perfect definitions, feel the truth in a shared glance or a silent understanding. This is a time to build emotional bridges, not just talk about them.
scorpion.work: A key project or negotiation reaches its peak, demanding both clarity and emotional intelligence. The Capricorn Moon gives your words weight and structure, but review all details twice before you commit. A past idea may resurface, offering a new path forward if you are willing to revise your plans.
scorpion.energy: The lunar peak can pull at your watery nature, creating high tides of emotion. Anchor yourself in the earth element of this moon through steady, mindful movement or a walk in nature; your power is not in resisting the current, but in grounding it.
scorpion.intuition: Beneath the brilliant light of the Full Moon, a deeper truth is gestating in the dark. Your intuition is a compass pointing not to a map, but to a hidden spring within. Trust the feeling that arises before the thought forms.
scorpion.mantra: I release old stories to speak my truth.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: A brilliant Full Moon in sober Capricorn illuminates your house of resources, casting a stark, clarifying light on what you truly value. This is a moment of culmination, where the emotional currents of the Cancer Sun meet the practical demands of your material world. Your security, both felt and earned, is under this powerful cosmic spotlight.
sagittaire.love: Discussions about shared assets or deep emotional commitments may reach a turning point. With Mercury retrograde in your house of intimacy, old conversations resurface with new weight. Seek clarity on what you both bring to the table, ensuring your foundations are built on mutual respect and tangible support.
sagittaire.work: A project may culminate, bringing financial realities into sharp focus. This Capricorn Moon demands a practical assessment of your income and efforts. It is an excellent day to review your budget and acknowledge the real-world results of your expansive visions, grounding your ambitions in solid earth.
sagittaire.energy: The earthy pull of this lunation may feel both grounding and a little heavy for your fiery spirit. You might feel a need to connect with nature, to walk barefoot on the ground, and to balance your inner fire with the steady presence of the earth.
sagittaire.intuition: Your intuition is a deep well today, drawing from the hidden currents of shared emotional spaces. Trust the feelings that arise concerning long-term investments of your heart and soul. The moonlight reveals truths that were previously hidden in the shadows.
sagittaire.mantra: My inner wealth is my true security.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Full Moon rises in your own sign tonight, Capricorn, placing you in a powerful silver spotlight. With the Sun opposite in Cancer, you feel the pull between your personal ambitions and the needs of your closest relationships. This is a moment of culmination, where the seeds you have patiently planted are now fully illuminated for all to see.
capricorne.love: Partnerships are under this potent lunar lens, and with Mercury retrograde in your opposite sign, old conversations may resurface. It is not a time for blame, but for clarity. Listen to what is said and unsaid to understand the true emotional currents flowing between you and another.
capricorne.work: A long-term project may reach its peak, bringing a moment of profound personal accomplishment. Your Saturn-ruled discipline has paid off, but be mindful of miscommunications in negotiations. Review details carefully before you commit to the next chapter of your work.
capricorne.energy: The lunar tide is at its highest within you, which can feel both intensely energizing and emotionally overwhelming. Ground yourself by walking on the earth or tending to something that grows, reconnecting with your native element.
capricorne.intuition: Your inner knowing is amplified, speaking in clear, resonant tones rather than whispers. Pay attention to the truths that surface from deep within. This Full Moon reveals not what you think, but what your soul already knows.
capricorne.mantra: I stand on my mountain and honor the path I have walked.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: A potent Full Moon rises in Capricorn, illuminating your most private inner chamber. This cosmic peak calls you away from the crowd and into quiet revelation, asking you to see what old structures are ready to be released. A tension exists between your daily duties and this profound need for soulful retreat.
verseau.love: With Mercury moving backward, words can become tangled nets rather than clear signals. True connection now lies in the spaces between sentences, in shared silence and intuitive glances. Listen to what is not being said; that is where the real conversation happens.
verseau.work: Your visionary mind is best turned inward, refining the blueprints of existing projects rather than launching new ones. A detail you previously overlooked now holds the key to a more solid and efficient system. Patience is your most valuable tool as you retrace your steps.
verseau.energy: This lunar tide pulls your energy deep within, toward the roots of your being. Do not fight this inward call by forcing activity. Your vitality is restored not through exertion, but through profound rest and quiet contemplation.
verseau.intuition: Your dreams and moments of solitude are incredibly potent, acting as a direct line to your subconscious. An old fear or limiting belief may surface, not to haunt you, but to be acknowledged and finally set free. Listen to the wisdom that whispers when the world is quiet.
verseau.mantra: My inner truth is my most solid ground.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The sky tonight is split by a luminous string, the Full Moon in Capricorn pulling at the Sun in your fellow water sign, Cancer. This illuminates the axis between your personal creativity and your role within the collective. You are being asked to bring your deepest dreams out of the ocean's depths and give them solid ground on which to stand.
poissons.love: Mercury's backward dance in your house of romance may stir old feelings, bringing a nostalgic tide. The Full Moon, however, calls for emotional honesty and structure in your connections. It's a time to understand whether your bonds are built on sand or on stone.
poissons.work: A collaborative project may reach a powerful culmination, or you might suddenly see which alliances are truly anchoring your future. This is a moment of release; let go of collective endeavors that drain your spirit to make space for those that truly reflect your vision.
poissons.energy: The tension between your inner world of play and your outer world of responsibility can feel draining. The Capricorn Moon favors solid ground. Reconnect with the earth by walking barefoot or simply feeling the weight of your body, a perfect anchor in emotional tides.
poissons.intuition: Like moonlight on water, this lunation reveals the hidden architecture of your hopes and friendships. Truths that were submerged in the unconscious now surface with clarity. Pay attention to your dreams; they are maps drawn by your soul.
poissons.mantra: I honor my dreams by giving them structure.
poissons.author: Sibylle
